name: CRE Workflows
description: Chainlink Runtime Environment workflow triggers and mock handlers

apiEndpoints.name: CRE Workflow Trigger
apiEndpoints.description: Dynamic route that triggers CRE workflows. In demo mode (no CRE_HTTP_TRIGGER_URL), returns hardcoded mock responses. In production, forwards to CRE HTTP Trigger.

requestBody.workflow: string (URL param: record-upload | consultation-processing | provider-decryption | payment-mint | provider-registration | data-marketplace)

serverFlow.description: Extract workflow name from dynamic route segment
Demo: 500ms delay → return getMockResponse(workflow). Live: POST to CRE HTTP Trigger URL
Return CREResponse JSON with success, txHash, data

errorResponses.when: Workflow name not in known set (success: false)
